assessment.summary_for_seller: Good run: you held context, answered on-point, and brought the conversation to a next step.

criteria.name: Contextual first contact
criteria.short_reason: First message anchors to a specific signal from the card.
criteria.evidence_quote:
Subject: BlueMesa: Процесс больше не масштабируется руками.

Hi Ирина Коваль,

Irina, I can see BlueMesa's contractor hiring is growing and ops is already falling behind on manual coordination. Mellow removes the manual layer: predictable payout flow, statuses without chats, less reconciliation.

What breaks in the process most often?

Best,
Pavel
criteria.label: Contextual opening

criteria.name: Email format
criteria.short_reason: Messages use correct email format: greeting and sign-off present.

criteria.name: Compliance and boundary of responsibility

Want me to send a rough calculation?

Best,
Pavel

objections.objection:
Sdr_agent,

Thanks for reaching out. I've built processes around multiple vendors. Each time it costs more than promised.

Best,
Ирина

Thanks for reaching out. Too early. You haven't convinced me yet this isn't just another vendor.

Best,
Ирина

Sdr_agent,

Thanks for reaching out. Send me one screen with the flow and what specifically stops being manual. If it's real, we can talk.

Best,
Ирина

Sdr_agent,

Thanks for reaching out. Send it. If it's concrete — I'll respond.

Best,
Ирина

Hi Ирина Коваль,

Irina, I can see BlueMesa's contractor hiring is growing and ops is already falling behind on manual coordination. Mellow removes the manual layer: predictable payout flow, statuses without chats, less reconciliation.
